figures.caption: Table 5. Truncation ablation (I0-R5 pipeline, simulated from offline score matrix). Top: fixed word budget; recall plateaus on LoCoMo but keeps improving on LME-S. Bottom: score-adaptive truncation with fixed budget ceiling 4,000 and top-K=60, sweeping α; the threshold adaptively allocates fewer tokens on short corpora and more on long ones. All deltas relative to budget 1K / α=0 baseline.

Table 8. Complete ablation results on LoCoMo (1,540 questions, gpt-4o-mini judge). ∆ is change vs. baseline (84.7%). Experiments grouped by phase. Baseline: MiniLM-L-12 reranker, threshold=−4, 2,000-word budget.

Table 9. Cross-encoder gold passage recovery at top-62 budget cutoff. 2,345 gold passages across 1,540 questions. Latency measured on CPU (single-threaded); in the full system, CrossEncoder and ColBERT run in parallel (wall-clock = max(CE,ColBERT)).
Table 7. LongMemEval-S accuracy (%). All systems use gpt-4.1-mini as answer LLM and gpt-4o-mini as judge. aHu et al. (2026). bXia et al. (2026).

Table 6. LoCoMo accuracy (%). Results under two incompatible evaluation protocols should not be compared across groups. aHu et al. (2026). bXia et al. (2026). †Within 1.1 pp of EverMemOS despite no memory system.
Table 1. Oracle trace analysis (LoCoMo, 1,317 traces) and ranking effect on both benchmarks. Mean gold rank: average position of the first gold passage among grep candidates.
